name: Arakas Latheros (Peas Latheros)
recipeIngredient: or 1 tbsp Tomato paste diluted with:
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell, wash, and drain the peas.
2. Chop the white part of the scallions into small pieces, and the green parts into large pieces.
3. Heat oil in a large pot.
4. Add the scallions and cook until soft but not browned.
5. Add the peas and brown them very lightly.
6. Add the tomatoes (or the diluted paste), dill, salt, and pepper.
7. Add enough water to half cover the peas.
8. Cover the pot and cook over medium heat until only the oil remains and the liquid has been absorbed (about 45 minutes).
- If using tomato paste instead of fresh tomatoes, add just enough water to cover the peas.
NOTE: You can make this without the tomatoes if you wish. In that case, add just enough water to cover the peas.
